title: ORA Details
description: Configuration for rendering entity and collection detail views.

bindingPath.description: RAMEN access path resolved relative to the current detail node.

binding.description: Binding resolved by the backend view endpoint relative to the current detail node.

path.description: RAMEN access path resolved by the backend view endpoint.

valueMap.description: Optional map replacing resolved raw values with display values before rendering.

bindingOrString.description: Either a backend-resolved binding or a static string.

citationTemplate.description: Translation-backed template configuration used to render a citation text. The template is usually a translation key; values are resolved and passed as translation parameters.

template.description: Translation key for the citation text, for example app.shared.citation.antjeBrons.default.

values.description: Values passed to the citation translation template. Each value is either a static translation key/string or a backend-resolved binding.

citationLink.description: Additional external link shown with the citation actions.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for the link.

href.description: External URL, either static or resolved from the backend.

icon.description: Optional icon class, for example a PrimeIcons class.

title.description: Static title or translation key shown above the citation block.

citation.description: Template configuration used to render the citation text.

license.description: Optional license key or binding resolving to a license key, for example cc-by-4.0 or app.shared.citation.license.ccBy40.

links.description: Additional external links shown next to the citation actions.

title.description: Binding resolving to the headline text.
Optional block title, either static or resolved from the backend.

text.description: Binding resolving to the text content.

annotations.description: Optional binding resolving to annotations applied to the text content.

attributesValueItem.description: Attribute item rendering a scalar value.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for this attribute.

isEmptyVisible.description: Whether the attribute should be rendered when the resolved value is empty.

emptyLabel.description: Fallback text or translation key shown when the resolved value is empty.

kind.description: Declares this attribute item as a scalar value item.

value.description: Binding resolving to the scalar attribute value.

attributesNodeItem.description: Attribute item rendering one or more referenced nodes.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for this attribute.

isEmptyVisible.description: Whether the attribute should be rendered when no referenced node is resolved.

emptyLabel.description: Fallback text or translation key shown when no referenced node is resolved.

kind.description: Declares this attribute item as a referenced-node item.

value.description: Binding resolving to one or more referenced nodes.

property.description: Node property used as the display value.

isLinked.description: Whether rendered node values should link to their detail pages.

attributesItem.description: One attribute row in an attributes block.

title.description: Static title or translation key shown above the attributes block.

items.description: Attribute rows rendered by this block.

type.description: Declares this block as a headline block.
Declares this block as an attributes block.

textBlock.description: Block rendering text content, optionally with annotations.

type.description: Declares this block as a text block.

citationBlock.description: Block rendering a citation notice with citation text, optional license notice, and optional external links.

type.description: Declares this block as a citation block.

block.description: A block rendered in a detail view.

detailView.description: Detail view definition for nodes matching one of the configured labels or types.

match.description: Node labels or type keys this detail view applies to.

blocks.description: Blocks rendered in this detail view.

detailViews.description: Configured detail views for entities and collections.
